subcodes.first_line: I have verily been blessed with the visitation of thy noble letter; I received it and brought it before My face, and when I read that wherewith thou didst praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فزت بزیاره کتابک الکریم قبلته و حضرت به تلقاء الوجه فلما قرات ما اثنیت به
subcodes.subjects: @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @grammar and orthography, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
